hooks.command: /bin/bash -lc 'root="$PWD"; while [ "$root" != "/" ] && [ ! -f "$root/AGENTS.md" ]; do root="$(dirname "$root")"; done; exec python3 "$root/scripts/hooks/session_start_context.py"'
/bin/bash -lc 'root="$PWD"; while [ "$root" != "/" ] && [ ! -f "$root/AGENTS.md" ]; do root="$(dirname "$root")"; done; exec python3 "$root/scripts/hooks/pre_tool_use_policy.py"'
